name: Broiled Bananas on Vanilla Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 4 ripe bananas, peeled and sliced in half lengthwise
Several curls of bittersweet chocolate (peeled off a bar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Arrange banana halves in a shallow pan, cut side up.
3. Sprinkle rum evenly over bananas and shake cinnamon on top.
4. Broil 4 inches from flame until softened and beginning to brown.
5. Place two banana halves in each of four bowls.
6. Top with vanilla ice cream and serve, topped with chocolate curls.
Yield: 4 servings
